<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [MyDNS.jp](https://www.mydns.jp) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/mydnsjp/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "mydnsjp"
  dnsCredentials:
    # MYDNSJP_MASTER_ID: Master ID
    masterID: ""
    # MYDNSJP_PASSWORD: Password
    password: ""
    # MYDNSJP_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # MYDNSJP_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # MYDNSJP_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
